title: Knysna High's 1st rugby team makes history with unbeaten tour
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna High School's 1st rugby team has written a new chapter in the school's sporting history, returning from the recent Patriot Sports Festival in Cape Town as the first Knysna High rugby team to complete a tour unbeaten.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna High School's 1st rugby team has written a new chapter in the school's sporting history, returning from the recent Patriot Sports Festival in Cape Town as the first Knysna High rugby team to complete a tour unbeaten."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This landmark achievement is a reflection of the team's dedication, grit, and excep-tional cohesion on the field,\" said Kevin Johnson, subject head for CAT/RTT at Knysna High.","html":"\"This landmark achievement is a reflection of the team's dedication, grit, and excep-tional cohesion on the field,\" said Kevin Johnson, subject head for CAT/RTT at Knysna High."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Facing strong competition from schools across the country, the team showcased a level of skill and unity that made their unbeaten run all the more impressive.","html":"Facing strong competition from schools across the country, the team showcased a level of skill and unity that made their unbeaten run all the more impressive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adding to the school's rugby accolades, three standout players - Lithe April, Adrian Konstabel and Milani Lufele - have been selected to join the Rhino Touring Squad, a prestigious development team that will tour Italy and the Netherlands in October.","html":"Adding to the school's rugby accolades, three standout players - Lithe April, Adrian Konstabel and Milani Lufele - have been selected to join the Rhino Touring Squad, a prestigious development team that will tour Italy and the Netherlands in October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Their selection not only honours their individual brilliance, but also underscores the quality of rugby being cultivated at Knysna High,\" Johnson said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Springbok legend Breyton Paulse","html":"Springbok legend Breyton Paulse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ahead of their historic tour, the team received a visit from former Springbok legend Breyton Paulse, who handed over their tour kits and delivered a message of encouragement.","html":"Ahead of their historic tour, the team received a visit from former Springbok legend Breyton Paulse, who handed over their tour kits and delivered a message of encouragement."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"It was a truly unforgettable moment,\" said Johnson."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"His message ignited an extra spark within our players and set the perfect tone for this historic journey.\"","html":"\"His message ignited an extra spark within our players and set the perfect tone for this historic journey.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Support behind the scenes","html":"Support behind the scenes"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The school thanked Dewald Walters of LARS and WE Properties, whose sponsorship of golf shirts, sports bags, caps and warm-up shirts helped ensure the team looked sharp and travelled prepared.","html":"The school thanked Dewald Walters of LARS and WE Properties, whose sponsorship of golf shirts, sports bags, caps and warm-up shirts helped ensure the team looked sharp and travelled prepared."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Big derby ahead","html":"Big derby ahead"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna High is preparing for a major third-term derby against Alexander Road High School from Gqeberha, set to take place on Saturday 16 August.","html":"Knysna High is preparing for a major third-term derby against Alexander Road High School from Gqeberha, set to take place on Saturday 16 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"After the match, a post-game braai and social will welcome ex-learners, parents and supporters to celebrate the day's sporting highlights and reconnect with the school community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna High School encourages parents, alumni and local sports fans to come out in full force.","html":"Knysna High School encourages parents, alumni and local sports fans to come out in full force."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna High's 1st rugby team makes history with unbeaten tour
